hero.title: Divetools
hero.subtitle: Dive Computer for Apple Watch Ultra
hero.tagline: Bühlmann ZHL-16C · Real-time Decompression · Depth Sensor

features.title: Built for Pro Divers
features.subtitle: Every tool for underwater safety, right on your wrist

items.title: Bühlmann ZHL-16C
items.desc: Industry-standard decompression algorithm with adjustable GF. Real-time GF99, SurfGF, and CNS tracking.

items.title: Real-time Depth Sensor
items.desc: 0.1m precision via Apple Watch Ultra pressure sensor. Supports depths up to 40m.

items.title: Gas Management
items.desc: Up to 4 gas mixes including EAN32, EAN36. Automatic ppO₂, MOD, and OTU calculation.

items.title: Freediving Mode
items.desc: Auto dive detection, surface interval timer, and max depth recording.

items.title: Safety Alerts
items.desc: Real-time warnings for ascent rate, ceiling violation, CNS, and OTU. 6-level haptic feedback.

items.title: iPhone Companion App
items.desc: Review dive logs, depth profile graphs, and sync settings wirelessly.

screenshots.title: Dive Computer on Your Wrist
screenshots.subtitle: 4-zone adaptive dive display, optimized for Apple Watch Ultra

showcase.title: Two Apps, One Dive Experience
showcase.subtitle: Your wrist-mounted dive computer and iPhone companion app work seamlessly together

features.title: Bühlmann ZHL-16C Decompression
features.desc: Adjustable GF with real-time GF99, SurfGF, and CNS tracking. Industry-standard algorithm.

features.title: Real-time Depth & Gas Monitoring
features.desc: 0.1m precision depth sensor. Up to 4 gas mixes including EAN32 and EAN36.

features.title: 4-Zone Adaptive Dive Display
features.desc: Depth, NDL, deco stops, and ascent rate at a glance — optimized for underwater use.

features.title: Safety Alerts & Haptic Feedback
features.desc: Instant warnings for ascent rate, ceiling, CNS/OTU violations. 6-level haptic patterns.

features.title: Dive Log Review
features.desc: Browse all recorded dives organized by date, depth, and location.

features.title: Depth Profile Graph
features.desc: Visual depth-over-time graphs to review and analyze your dive patterns.

features.title: Settings Sync
features.desc: Gradient factors, gas profiles, and unit preferences sync automatically with your Watch.

features.title: Apple Health Integration
features.desc: Dive workouts written to Apple Health. Track heart rate and calories alongside dive data.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Bug reports, feature requests, collaboration inquiries — send anything. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.name: Name
contact.successBody: We'll reply to your email as soon as possible. Thank you.
